JUPAS (Code: JS6418) Bachelor of Nursing (Advanced Leadership Track)
Programme Highlights:

Articulation to HKU MBBS and completion of two professional degrees in nine years.
First and the only Dual Degree programme in Hong Kong with Bachelor of Nursing and Master qualifications in five years:
Bachelor of Nursing (Advanced Leadership Track) and Master of Nursing (MNurs); or
Bachelor of Nursing (Advanced Leadership Track) and Master of Research (MRes).
A dedicated academic advisor and a nurse practitioner will be assigned to each student as personalised mentors throughout the studies.

replies.msg: 在國際定義上護士是治療的決策者，現在在香港是有實無名，這必須要在法律上完全實現。外國護士法定獨立診療處方早己存在多年，而且行之有效，大量研究証實護士診治疾病臨床效果至少等於，很多時甚至優於醫生，包括死亡率更低。
